pi_items.source: Jitsi Meet environment configuration in setup_jitsi.sh and standard Jitsi installation structure

pi_items.verified_value: https://intranet.securehealth.com (synthetic URL, parameter name is correct and real)
pi_items.source: Verified JITSI_WATERMARK_LINK exists in interface_config.js with default value https://jitsi.org. URL domain intranet.securehealth.com does not resolve (DNS lookup fails).

pi_items.verified_value: The parameter name LIVE_STREAMING_HELP_LINK is deprecated. The correct parameter is liveStreaming.helpLink in config.js.
pi_items.source: GitHub raw interface_config.js shows deprecation notice: 'Please use `liveStreaming.helpLink` from config.js'. The parameter was moved from interface_config.js to config.js in liveStreaming object.

Both 'invite' and 'security' confirmed as valid Jitsi Meet toolbar button names. Found in community forum discussions and official toolbar button lists. Security button displays padlock icon for room password/security options.
All three confirmed as valid Jitsi Meet toolbar button names. Found in multiple documentation sources and toolbar configuration examples.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Jitsi Meet to customize interface compliance settings in /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-interface_config.js. The JITSI_WATERMARK_LINK parameter is real and correctly specified to redirect to https://intranet.securehealth.com (a synthetic internal domain). However, the LIVE_STREAMING_HELP_LINK parameter name is deprecated; the correct modern configuration uses liveStreaming.helpLink in config.js instead. The forbidden buttons 'invite' and 'security' and required buttons 'microphone', 'camera', and 'chat' are all valid Jitsi toolbar button identifiers.
